projectDescription: A FastAPI-based REST service for emitting electronic invoices, credit notes, and debit notes to the DIAN (Colombia's tax authority) SOAP web service, with PostgreSQL audit logging.
keyFeatures: Electronic invoice emission (Factura Electrónica) to DIAN via SOAP
Credit note (Nota Crédito) generation referencing original CUFE
Delivery order (Domicilio) invoicing with separate delivery fee taxation
PFX digital certificate loading and validation on startup (fast-fail)
Hexagonal architecture with clean separation of domain, application, and infrastructure
Async SOAP client using zeep + httpx for non-blocking FastAPI event loop
PostgreSQL-backed audit logging of all DIAN transaction attempts
Support for INC (8%), IVA (19%), voluntary tips (non-taxable), and multiple payment methods
publicApiSurface: POST /api/v1/pedidos/consumo-local/ — Submit a dine-in order for electronic invoicing
IDianSoapPort.send_invoice(invoice_data) — Port for sending invoices to DIAN
IDianSoapPort.send_credit_note(note_data) — Port for sending credit notes to DIAN
IInvoiceLogRepositoryPort.save_log(status, payload_in, response_out) — Port for persisting transaction logs
FacturarPedidoLocalUseCase.execute(payload) — Use case for billing a local order
DianSoapAdapter(wsdl_url, cert_path, password) — Zeep-based SOAP adapter
Settings — Pydantic settings model (DIAN_CERT_PATH, DIAN_CERT_PASSWORD, DIAN_TEST_SET_ID, DIAN_SOFTWARE_ID, DIAN_SOFTWARE_PIN, ENVIRONMENT, DIAN_WSDL_URL_HABILITACION, DIAN_WSDL_URL_PRODUCCION)
PedidoLocalCreateRequest — Pydantic request schema for local orders
PedidoLocalResponse — Pydantic response schema (track_id, cufe, status, message)
